title: API Gateway with Circuit Breaker
scenario: Design an API gateway with a circuit breaker pattern to ensure that a fictional e-commerce platform's APIs are fault-tolerant and can recover from service outages. The LLM output should be a Python script that defines the API gateway using the Flask framework. Constraints: The script should not exceed 150 lines, and it should include error handling for API requests.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the code is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
Verify that the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check that the circuit breaker pattern is implemented correctly.
Verify that the code includes error handling for API requests.
